comment_text:
I started watching it at a young age, and my school ended on April 25th, with my last exam on May 21st. 

I had this little dream that I'd finish school at the same time as the Big Mouth kids, since they're graduating in the final season and I’d be finishing too, but unfortunately, I’ll be two days late. 🥺

Either way, I'm happy and grateful that the show got so many seasons. 

Nothing lasts forever, but I truly appreciate the creators for giving us such a beautiful series. 🥺💖

comment_text:
About time!!!
After waiting 1 and a half year & 7 months, we finally have Big Mouth Season 8!!!
And it’s the final season of Big Mouth!!!

Let’s recap all of the Big Mouth season arcs:
Season 1 (Beginning of puberty)
Season 2 (Shame)
Season 3 (Girls, I honestly don’t know what was the theme for S3)
Season 4 (Anxiety)
Season 5 (Love & Hate)
Season 6 (Families)
Season 7 (High School)
Season 8 (Series Finale and epic conclusion to the Big Mouth series)

I’m going to miss these characters because I had a blast watching this animated Adult series since day one. I hope the creators and writers made this true ending and series finale an ending to remember, I want to see how Big Mouth will end on a satisfying and a slightly different note.
